title: Data Quality Engineer
description: Ensuring the reliability and accuracy of data pipelines and analytical systems at Iran's leading ride-hailing platform.
highlights: Monitoring and validating data quality across large-scale data pipelines
Collaborating with data engineering teams to identify and resolve data anomalies
Developing automated quality checks using Python and SQL

title: Software Test Engineer
description: Designed and executed test strategies for software systems at scale, ensuring product reliability for millions of users.
highlights: Developed and maintained test plans and test cases for core platform features
Applied ML/AI testing methodologies to validate intelligent system components
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to improve software quality processes

title: Quality Assurance Engineer Teamlead
description: Led the QA engineering team, overseeing quality assurance processes and mentoring team members to maintain high software standards.
highlights: Led and coordinated the QA team's testing efforts
Established quality standards and testing best practices
Collaborated with product and development teams on release planning

title: Quality Assurance Specialist
description: Performed comprehensive software quality assurance, developing test cases and ensuring product reliability across the development lifecycle.
highlights: Designed and executed functional, regression, and exploratory test cases
Identified and reported defects, collaborating with developers on resolution
Contributed to improving QA workflows and documentation
